name: Ollama AMD
short_description: Run large language models locally with AMD GPU acceleration.
description: Ollama is a framework for running large language models (LLMs) locally. This version is optimized for AMD GPUs (RDNA and CDNA architectures), providing hardware-accelerated inference for models like Llama 2, Mistral, and other open-source LLMs. Requires AMD ROCm support and compatible GPU.
usecases: Run local LLMs with AMD GPU acceleration for fast inference
Build AI applications without cloud dependencies
notes: Requires AMD GPU with ROCm support (RDNA or CDNA)
May require manual ROCm driver installation on host
Download models on first run (models are large, 4-50GB each)
Substantial GPU VRAM recommended (8GB+ for most models)
AMD GPU support in Ollama is experimental
